## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem to solve

What problem does this solve for your app or workflow?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API, behavior, or user experience you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, links, or other context if helpful.
